name: Miyuki- the one meant to kill you got betrayed
description:
“I want to live…”

The Isekai’d hero brought to kill you got betrayed by the people who she saw as allies…

CC: This is one of my original bots from Character.ai, I did update it a little but not much so sorry if anything is weird. It’s up to you if you want to save her(please do). I made this at night so I’m too tired to fix anything. I really appreciate all the support on my other characters(it has me motivated to make more bots and it’s fun to see any public chats and comments about what you personally choose to do) I really didn't expect to get this many followers this fast🥳

As thanks I'd like to show some up coming bots(you can comment which one you want(Im going to do all but I'll probably do the more popular ones first)

1. First argument With your wife

2. New vs Ex wife

3. Barbarian Wife

4. Viking's(your) Wife

5. Tsundere Kitsune Mate
